title: CreatiVault Creator Search & Influencer Discovery
description: Find creators and influencer leads across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Pricing is pay-per-event: creator/video/lookalike results are charged per returned record, while audits, exports, uploads, and outreach emails are charged per successful action.

operation.title: What do you want to do?
operation.description: Choose the workflow. Empty searches, failed requests, and status polling are not charged.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram are supported for search and most workflows. Twitter/X is supported only for collection link/username/keyword tasks.

serviceLevel.title: Creator data depth
serviceLevel.description: Creator search pricing depends on data depth: S1 basic profile, S2 enriched profile/contact data, S3 deep audience profile.

maxResults.title: Max billable records
maxResults.description: Maximum records to return and charge for in paged result workflows.

size.title: Page size
size.description: Creator/collection page size max 100. Video search is capped at 10 by the backend.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Creator keyword, topic, niche, username, or video title keyword.

countryCode.title: Creator country code
countryCode.description: Creator country/region code, comma-separated for multiple values, for example US,CA.

languageCode.title: Creator language code
languageCode.description: Creator content language code, comma-separated for multiple values, for example en,es.

industry.title: Industry or category
industry.description: Industry/category filter. Category names or supported IDs can be used.

followersCntLte.title: Maximum followers
followersCntLte.description: Maximum followers/subscribers. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoViewsGte.title: Minimum average views
last10AvgVideoViewsGte.description: Minimum average views. The actor maps this to the correct platform field.

last10AvgVideoViewsLte.title: Maximum average views
last10AvgVideoViewsLte.description: Maximum average views. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoInteractionRateGte.title: Minimum interaction rate (%)
last10AvgVideoInteractionRateGte.description: Minimum interaction rate as a 0-100 percentage.

last10AvgVideoInteractionRateLte.title: Maximum interaction rate (%)
last10AvgVideoInteractionRateLte.description: Maximum interaction rate as a 0-100 percentage. Leave as 0 to omit.

hasEmail.title: Only creators with email
hasEmail.description: Return only creators with public email contact when supported.

audienceCountryCodeList.title: Audience country codes
audienceCountryCodeList.description: Audience country code list, comma-separated. Best used with S3.

audienceLanguageCodeList.title: Audience language codes
audienceLanguageCodeList.description: Audience language code list, comma-separated. Best used with S3.

audienceFemaleRateGte.title: Minimum female audience (%)
audienceFemaleRateGte.description: Minimum female audience percentage. Best used with S3.

sortField.title: Sort field
sortField.description: Optional. Leave empty to use a platform-safe default.

videoTitle.title: Video title keyword
videoTitle.description: Video title keyword for video search.

videoViewsCntGte.title: Minimum video views
videoViewsCntGte.description: Minimum video views for video search.

videoInteractionRateGte.title: Minimum video interaction rate (%)
videoInteractionRateGte.description: Minimum video interaction rate as 0-100 percentage.

values.title: Collection values
values.description: Profile links, usernames, creator profile URLs, post URLs, or other collection values.

taskType.title: Collection task type
taskType.description: Twitter/X supports only profile links and usernames.

taskId.title: Task ID
taskId.description: Collection, outreach, or video audit task ID for status/data/export/result operations.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Optional HTTPS callback URL for collection tasks.

waitForCompletion.title: Wait for task completion
waitForCompletion.description: For collection, video audit, and outreach submit operations, poll task status before finishing. Status polling itself is free.

maxPollAttempts.title: Max poll attempts
maxPollAttempts.description: Maximum polling attempts before timing out.

fetchData.title: Fetch completed collection data
fetchData.description: After a completed collection task, fetch paginated data into the dataset. Charged per returned record.

exportFormat.title: Export format
exportFormat.description: Collection export format. Charged per successful export.

videoUrl.title: Video URL
videoUrl.description: TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts URL for video audit.

uploadedOssKey.title: Uploaded OSS key
uploadedOssKey.description: OSS key returned by media upload for video audit.

brief.title: Audit brief
brief.description: Optional customer brief for video audit.

enableBenchmark.title: Enable benchmark comparison
enableBenchmark.description: Compare video audit against benchmark library.

fileUrl.title: File URL
fileUrl.description: Public URL for media upload or outreach attachment upload.

filename.title: Upload filename
filename.description: Optional filename override for upload operations.

uid.title: Creator UID
uid.description: Creator UID from search results. Required for single outreach send.

recipients.title: Batch outreach recipients
recipients.description: Batch outreach recipients. Each item should include email and uid. Charged per accepted email.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Retries for temporary rate-limit and server errors.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional. CreatiVault OpenAPI is server-to-server, so a proxy is usually unnecessary.
